LAW AND MOTION 302, ZIMMER, INC. AND ZIMMER FEGAN AND MALONEY, INC.'S MOTION TO STRIKE PARTICULAR ALLEGATIONS IN PLAINTIFFS FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT, DEFENDANT ZIMMER, INC.'S MOTION TO STRIKE THE PUNITIVE DAMAGES ALLEGATIONS IN THE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF FILED A NOTICE THAT SHE DOES NOT OPPOSE THE MOTION. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; CLERK: SEAN KANE; REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR #5976 (302/HK)

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT ZIMMER INC.'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO THE FIRST CAUSE OF ACTION FOR PRODUCT LIABILITY - DEFECTIVE DESIGN, SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND BUT WITHOUT PREJUDICE TO SEEKING LEAVE TO AMEND BY NOTICED MOTION AS TO THE FOURTH CAUSE OF ACTION FOR NEGLIGENCE, AND OVERRULED AS TO THE SECOND CAUSE OF ACTION FOR PRODUCT LIABILITY - MANUFACTURING DEFECT AND THE THIRD CAUSE OF ACTION FOR PRODUCT LIABILITY - FAILURE TO WARN. THE PARTIES HAVE AGREED TO ALL OF THESE RULINGS EXCEPT THE RULING AS TO THE THIRD CAUSE OF ACTION. AS TO THE THIRD CAUSE OF ACTION, THE COURT BELIEVES THAT LEAVE TO AMEND HAD BEEN PREVIOUSLY GRANTED AS TO THAT CLAIM BECAUSE THE ORIGINAL COMPLAINT SOUGHT TO ALLEGE SUCH A CLAIM IN PARAGRAPH 73 OF THAT PLEADING. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; CLERK: SEAN KANE; REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR #5976 (302/HK)

MINI MINUTES:

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-01-2016 Continued To Mar-30-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Zimmer, Inc. And Zimmer Fegan And Maloney, Inc.S Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Particular Allegations In Plaintiffs First Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Feb-05-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. As to Defendants Zimmer, Inc. And Zimmer Fegan And Maloney, Inc.'s Motion To Strike Particular Allegations In Plaintiffs First Amended Complaint, Defendant Zimmer, Inc.'s motion to strike the punitive damages allegations in the first amended complaint is granted. Plaintiff filed a notice that she does not oppose the motion. ORDER SIGNED. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976 (302/HK)

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-05-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT ZIMMER INC.'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is sustained without leave to amend as to the first cause of action for product liability - defective design, sustained without leave to amend but without prejudice to seeking leave to amend by noticed motion as to the fourth cause of action for negligence, and overruled as to the second cause of action for product liability - manufacturing defect and the third cause of action for product liability - failure to warn. The parties have agreed to all of these rulings except the ruling as to the third cause of action. As to the third cause of action, the court believes that leave to amend had been previously granted as to that claim because the original complaint sought to allege such a claim in paragraph 73 of that pleading. ORDER SIGNED. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976 (302/HK)
